content: The significance of temple construction and architecture in ancient scriptures is highlighted in texts such as the Agni Purana [1] and Kamika Agama [2], which provide guidelines for building temples. According to these scriptures, constructing a temple can bring spiritual benefits and destroy sins. The architecture of a temple, including its base, pedestal, and door orientation, is also considered important. The influence of these scriptures on society can be seen in the careful planning and construction of temples, with attention to detail and adherence to traditional guidelines.
